query:
-- The new strains have prices like 320-450 cents which is wholesale/spot price
-- Retail per-gram should be $8-$15 for quality flower
-- Update all flower products that still have prices under 800 cents (under $8/gram)
UPDATE products SET 
  retailPrice = ROUND(price * 1.5),
  price = CASE 
    WHEN price < 400 THEN price * 3    -- $3.20 -> $9.60/gram
    WHEN price < 500 THEN price * 2.8  -- $4.00 -> $11.20/gram  
    ELSE price * 2.5                   -- $4.50 -> $11.25/gram
  END
WHERE category = 'flower' AND price < 800;

-- Verify the fix
SELECT name, price, retailPrice, category FROM products WHERE category = 'flower' ORDER BY price LIMIT 20;
